title: Advantages of Corrugated Cardboard
content: Fruits and vegetables are delicate goods that must be transported with care to preserve their freshness and quality.
header: Advantages of Corrugated Cardboard in Fresh Produce Logistics
detail_content:
Fruits and vegetables are delicate goods that must be transported with care to preserve their freshness and quality. That's why the right packaging matters so much. Proper packaging not only ensures products reach their destination undamaged, but also makes the entire logistics process more efficient.

5 Reasons to Choose Corrugated Cardboard
Corrugated cardboard boxes are among the most preferred packaging solutions for fresh produce logistics. Here are some of the advantages they provide:

1. Durability and Protection
Corrugated cardboard boxes are remarkably strong despite being lightweight. They protect fruits and vegetables from external factors and prevent damage that may occur during shipping. Resistant to impact and crushing, they keep your products safe.

2. Air Circulation
Corrugated cardboard boxes are designed to let fruits and vegetables breathe. This allows produce to release moisture naturally and keeps humidity levels under control. Proper air circulation is critical for preserving freshness — especially for fruits and vegetables.

3. Recyclability
Corrugated cardboard boxes are an eco-friendly packaging solution. They can be easily recycled and are biodegradable. An ideal choice for businesses looking for a sustainable shipping solution.

4. Print and Branding Opportunities
Corrugated cardboard boxes can be easily printed and produced with designs that represent your brand. This is an excellent opportunity to promote your products and strengthen your brand. Custom printing enhances the aesthetic appeal of the boxes while improving the customer experience.

5. Cost Efficiency
Corrugated cardboard boxes are an economical packaging solution thanks to low production costs. Their light weight reduces shipping costs, while their durability minimizes product loss.

title: Packaging Solutions of the Future
content: The packaging industry is undergoing rapid transformation alongside digitalization and technological progress.
detail_content:
The packaging industry is undergoing rapid transformation alongside digitalization and technological progress. Smart packaging technologies sit at the heart of this transformation, delivering important innovations across many areas — from the consumer experience to logistics. In the packaging world of the future, the role of smart technologies will only grow.

What Are Smart Packaging Technologies?
Smart packaging technologies can be defined as solutions that increase a package's functionality through digital and technological components integrated into traditional packaging. These technologies bring significant advantages in product tracking, quality control, customer engagement and sustainability.

QR Codes and NFC Tags
QR codes and NFC (Near Field Communication) tags are among the most widely used components of smart packaging. They are used to provide consumers with more information about a product, prevent counterfeiting and increase engagement between brands and consumers. By scanning a QR code, for example, you can learn about a product's origin, production date and ingredients.

RFID Technology
RFID (Radio-Frequency Identification) is revolutionizing supply chain management. RFID tags enable products to be tracked, inventory management to be optimized and issues such as theft to be prevented. With this technology, it's possible to know instantly where a product is at every stage of the supply chain.

Sensors and Data Collection
Smart packaging is being equipped with sensors that monitor environmental conditions. Particularly in the food and pharmaceutical sectors, monitoring factors like temperature, humidity and light is critical. Sensors collect this data to ensure quality control and help deliver safe products to consumers.

Interactive Packaging
Interactive packaging delivers unique, personalized experiences to consumers. Designed to interact with smartphones and other devices, this packaging gives access to games, rewards, special offers or virtual-reality experiences. These innovations are used to grow brand loyalty and strengthen the bond between consumer and brand.

Sustainability and Waste Management
Smart packaging technologies also play an important role in achieving sustainability goals. RFID tags, for example, make it easier to sort materials correctly at recycling facilities.

title: New to E-Commerce?
content: Just getting started in e-commerce? Don't underestimate packaging!
header: New to E-Commerce? Don't Underestimate Packaging!
detail_content:
Just getting started in e-commerce? If you want to deliver your products to your customers safely and quickly, you shouldn't take packaging lightly. Packaging not only protects your products — it's also an important part of how you promote your brand and improve the customer experience.

Demand for E-Commerce Packaging Is Rising
Thanks to technology, it's now possible to shop from anywhere in the world at the click of a button. This is driving up demand for sturdy, reliable packaging solutions. As businesses grow and new ventures emerge, demand for e-commerce packaging is expected to grow by 15% annually through 2025.

Our Experience and Recommendations
As one of Turkey's leading corrugated packaging suppliers, we have seen e-commerce open up an entirely new customer segment. Companies entering this space quickly realize that packaging is a cornerstone of their business — and that building an effective packaging strategy matters more than they expected. Here are a few tips:

1. Fewer Options Aren't Always Better
You might think keeping the number of box sizes you use to a minimum is a good idea. But using only a handful of sizes for all your products can mean shipping some items in oversized boxes. That translates to extra void fill and higher shipping costs. Increasing your box variety and using the right size for each product is far more economical.

2. Fast Growth and Flexibility
Fast growth is every entrepreneur's dream — but problems can arise during that growth. We help companies that are scaling order volume to meet rising e-commerce demand. Staying flexible — tracking shipping costs and adjusting your packaging strategy when needed — is essential.

3. Marketing-Driven Packaging
Custom packaging is a powerful way to extend your brand and offer a unique experience to your customers. But the design phase should come after careful work on operations, marketing goals and costs.

The path to success in e-commerce runs through the right packaging strategy. Give packaging the attention it deserves to deliver products safely, promote your brand and increase customer satisfaction. Don't take customer comments saying "the packaging was awful" lightly.

title: DRUPA 2024
content: We were at Drupa 2024, the trade fair that brings packaging industry representatives from around the world together and takes the pulse of the sector.
header: Drupa 2024: A Journey into the Future of the Packaging Industry
detail_content:
We were at Drupa 2024, the trade fair that brings packaging industry representatives from around the world together and takes the pulse of the sector.

Held every four years, Drupa hosts leading packaging companies along with exhibitors offering equipment, machinery and raw materials to meet their needs. Held for the first time after an eight-year gap due to the pandemic, this gathering allowed us to witness the speed of change firsthand.

In recent years the pace of change in the world has reached extraordinary levels, and the packaging industry has had its share. Our observations at the fair showed that the difficulty of finding blue-collar workers has become one of the industry's biggest problems. Based on the conversations we had, accessing skilled labor was the common challenge for both Turkish and global packaging brands. That's why many of the companies attending Drupa 2024 came with high expectations to explore robotics and automation solutions.

Robot technology is expected to be a remedy for the entire manufacturing sector struggling with blue-collar labor shortages. Otherwise, manufacturers face the threat of closure. The three main reasons can be summarized as follows:

Forced to operate with existing staff: Production facilities that cannot find blue-collar workers have to continue manufacturing with their current staff. This means restricted production capacity, particularly in our country where overhead costs are high and profitability is low — a combination that can drive businesses to shut down.
Inability to invest: When the lack of blue-collar workers prevents production and machine fleet from expanding — meaning new investments cannot be made — companies become trapped in their current state. It's hard for production facilities that cannot grow to stay afloat.
Industry change: Company executives who can't find blue-collar workers and aren't satisfied with the current situation step away from manufacturing and shift to easier-to-sustain sectors where labor is easier to find — raw materials supply, sales, finance, marketing, logistics, after-sales service or installment-based sales. This weakens — and can even erode — our country's manufacturing capacity.

Executives who are deeply committed to manufacturing and want to overcome these challenges and keep producing continue to explore automation solutions at global fairs like Drupa. We believe this fair, where we came together with our stakeholders to take new steps toward shared solutions, was very useful for both Mabsan and the industry as a whole.

See you again at Drupa 2028…
M. Sabri Mersin.

title: 7 Ways Sustainable Packaging Adds Value to Your Brand
content: Sustainable packaging is no longer a preference — it's a responsibility. We examined 7 dimensions in which recyclable corrugated cardboard adds tangible business value to your brand.
header: 7 Values Sustainable Packaging Brings to Your Brand
detail_content:
78% of consumers consider whether the packaging is environmentally friendly when making a purchasing decision. This is no longer just a trend; it's a powerful preference that has moved to the center of brands' strategic agendas. Sustainable packaging adds tangible business value to your brand — well beyond environmental responsibility.

Recyclable corrugated cardboard is one of the most practical and proven solutions in this transformation. So what value does sustainable packaging actually bring to your brand?

1. A Stronger Brand Perception
Today's consumers look at the values behind the products they buy. Brands that use sustainable packaging position themselves as responsible companies that respect nature. This raises your brand value over the long term.

2. Compliance with Regulations
The European Union's Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) regulations and Turkey's Packaging Waste Regulation are making sustainable packaging mandatory. Recyclable corrugated cardboard meets these obligations automatically.

3. Savings on Logistics Costs
Its lightweight structure reduces shipping fuel consumption. Corrugated cardboard produced from recycled paper can also lower raw-material costs by 15% to 30%.

4. Positive Contribution to ESG Scores
Investors and large customers scrutinize their suppliers' ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) scores. Sustainable packaging delivers a direct improvement in those reports.

5. Customer Loyalty
Research shows that 66% of consumers are willing to pay more to shop from environmentally friendly brands. Sustainable packaging is a powerful tool that supports premium pricing.

6. Content and Marketing Advantage
The sustainability story is a powerful narrative on social media and in content marketing. Customers want to share the message "I can recycle this box" — and that means organic reach.

7. Employee Engagement
Teams that feel they're working in alignment with their company's values are more engaged and productive. The decision to use sustainable packaging contributes positively to corporate culture.

At Mabsan, the corrugated cardboard solutions we produce from recycled paper are 100% recyclable and biodegradable. We're with you on your brand's sustainability journey.
